text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh no! Don't beat yourself up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm already so happy and grateful that you tried
your best for me, so please don't feel bad!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, why don't we get something sweet to eat?
We can have sweet steamed buns or a cake or
something! Anything's fine with me!
